name: Shields Table Lamp - 20.75 Inch Height - TBL4535 - White/Brass - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the contemporary elegance of the Shields table lamp. Standing at 20.75 inches, this lamp is a perfect blend of style and functionality. The sleek design combines white and brass hues, creating a striking contrast that enhances any decor. Crafted from durable metal, the lamp exhibits a minimalist and refined aesthetic that fits seamlessly into modern living spaces. The base, made of smooth marble, adds a touch of sophistication and stability. Whether for your study, living room, or bedside, this lamp provides an inviting glow that complements any environment. Embrace simplicity and style with the Shields table lamp.
